title: Fried Catfish in Cedar Rapids | Captains Fish and Chicken

body: Craving fried catfish in Cedar Rapids? Captains Fish and Chicken fries catfish fresh to order at 1616 1st Ave NE, so every fillet, steak, and basket of nuggets comes out hot, crisp, and never sitting under a heat lamp. Choose from delicate catfish fillet, meaty catfish steak, or bite-sized catfish nuggets, then round it out with classic sides. Whether it is a Friday fish fry, a family dinner, or a quick lunch, our catfish is battered and dropped after you order. body: Captains Fish and Chicken opened in 2024 on 1st Avenue NE in Cedar Rapids, founded by owner Ray Aqel with one guiding idea: fish, chicken, and seafood should be made fresh to order. From the start, Ray built the kitchen around that promise. Nothing sits under a heat lamp waiting for a customer. When you order, we batter and drop it, so your catfish, cod, snapper, wings, tenders, and shrimp come out hot and crisp. You will find us at 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402, serving the northeast side and neighboring Marion. title: Made Fresh to Order | Captains Fish and Chicken
headline: Why everything at Captains is made fresh to order
body: At Captains Fish and Chicken, made fresh to order is not a slogan, it is how the kitchen runs. When owner Ray Aqel opened Captains in 2024 on 1st Avenue NE in Cedar Rapids, he built the whole operation around one promise: your fish, chicken, and seafood should be battered and dropped after you order, never pre-cooked and left sitting under a heat lamp. That choice changes everything you taste. A catfish fillet comes out flaky with a crisp, hot crust. Wings arrive crackling rather than soggy. Shrimp stay tender and juicy. It takes a few extra minutes, and that trade is the point, because those minutes are the difference between food that was made for you and food that was made hours ago for someone else. From a quick lunch to a full family dinner or a party pan for catering, everything we serve gets the same fresh-to-order treatment at 1616 1st Ave NE. Rated 4.4 on Google. Call (319) 221-1040 to order or to confirm current hours.

sections.heading: The fresh-to-order difference
sections.text: Frying to order means your food is never batched in advance and held. Batter goes on and the fryer does its work only after you place your order. That is why our catfish, cod, snapper, wings, tenders, and shrimp come out hot and crisp. It is a small wait for a big difference in taste and texture.

sections.heading: Built into the business from day one
sections.text: Owner Ray Aqel opened Captains in 2024 with fresh-to-order as the foundation, not an afterthought. Every part of the menu, from single baskets to family fish deals up to 50 pieces and party pans for catering, follows the same standard. Call (319) 221-1040 for pickup at 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, or order delivery through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub. Please call to confirm current hours.

faqs.question: What does made fresh to order mean here?
faqs.answer: It means we batter and fry your food only after you place your order, rather than pre-cooking it and holding it under a heat lamp. Your meal comes out hot and crisp.

faqs.question: Does fresh to order take longer?
faqs.answer: It takes a few extra minutes, which is why we suggest calling (319) 221-1040 ahead for pickup. Those minutes are what make the food hot and crisp.

headline: Fried fish and chicken catering for offices, parties, and family gatherings
body: Feeding a crowd in Cedar Rapids? Captains caters the easy way: big-batch fried fish and chicken, packed hot and ready to serve. Fish Only Family Deals scale from 10 pieces to a full 50-piece spread of catfish, perch, and tilapia; catfish nuggets come by the half pan ($49.99) or full pan ($89.99); party wings stack from 16 to 50 pieces; and full pans of fries round out the table. There is no order form and no middleman markup — call (319) 221-1040, tell us your headcount and pickup time, and the kitchen fries everything fresh for your window. Office lunches, birthdays, game days, church gatherings, graduation parties — if it needs to feed ten to fifty people, a couple of pans from Captains handles it.

sections.heading: What to order for a crowd
sections.text: 10–15 people: a 20-piece fish family deal + a half pan of catfish nuggets + a full pan of fries. 20–30 people: the 30- or 40-piece fish deal + 30 party wings. 40+: the 50-piece fish deal + 50 party wings + two full pans of fries.

sections.heading: How catering orders work
sections.text: Call (319) 221-1040 with your headcount and pickup time. Everything is fried fresh for your window — no steam trays sitting for hours. Pickup at 1616 1st Ave NE; delivery-app orders work for smaller gatherings.

faqs.question: How much notice does a catering order need in Cedar Rapids?
faqs.answer: Call (319) 221-1040 with your headcount and pickup window. Larger pans and 50-piece deals benefit from a few hours' notice so everything comes out of the fryer together.

faqs.question: How many people does a 50-piece fish family deal feed?
faqs.answer: Plan roughly 2–3 pieces per adult: a 50-piece catfish, perch and tilapia deal comfortably anchors a spread for 20–25 people; add party wings and pan fries for larger groups.

faqs.question: Do you have party pans of sides?
faqs.answer: Yes — fries come by the half pan ($16.99) and full pan ($27.99), and catfish nuggets by the half ($49.99) or full pan ($89.99).

seo.title: Catering — Party Pans & 50-pc Fish Deals | Captains Cedar Rapids
seo.description: Fried fish and chicken catering in Cedar Rapids: family fish deals to 50 pieces, catfish nugget pans, party wings. Call (319) 221-1040 with your headcount.

title: Our Location — Captains Fish and Chicken, Cedar Rapids
headline: One location: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids
body: Captains Fish and Chicken operates ONE location: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402, on the 1st Avenue NE corridor near the Mound View and Wellington Heights neighborhoods, minutes from downtown Cedar Rapids and Coe College with quick access from I-380. Call (319) 221-1040. For clarity, because older listings still circulate: our former second location at 3100 6th St SW closed as a Captains and now operates as Pita Kabab, a Mediterranean restaurant from the same owner, Ray Aqel. Any listing showing a Captains Fish and Chicken at 3100 6th St SW is out of date — all Captains orders, pickup, and catering run through the 1st Ave NE kitchen. We serve the whole metro through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub delivery.

sections.heading: Getting here
sections.text: 1616 1st Ave NE sits on the main 1st Avenue corridor — from I-380 take the downtown exits toward 1st Avenue and head northeast; the restaurant is a few minutes from downtown and Coe College.

sections.heading: About the former 6th St SW location
sections.text: The 3100 6th St SW spot operated as a second Captains during 2025 and is now Pita Kabab (same owner, different menu). If an app or directory still lists a Captains there, the listing is stale — this page is the current, authoritative record: one Captains, at 1616 1st Ave NE.

faqs.question: How many locations does Captains Fish and Chicken have?
faqs.answer: One: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402, phone (319) 221-1040. The former 3100 6th St SW location is now Pita Kabab, a different restaurant from the same owner.

faqs.question: Is the Captains Fish and Chicken on 6th St SW still open?
faqs.answer: No. That address closed as a Captains and now operates as Pita Kabab (Mediterranean, same owner). All Captains orders go through 1616 1st Ave NE — (319) 221-1040.

seo.title: Location — One Kitchen at 1616 1st Ave NE | Captains Cedar Rapids
seo.description: Captains Fish and Chicken has one location: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids. The former 6th St SW spot is now Pita Kabab. Call (319) 221-1040.
